versions.version_description: Neat formatting, all lyrics with accompanying chords, additional playing information, full chord legend included https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iLtGTwIxZZs.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
CAPO on 9th FRET to play along with recorded version

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Hey little girl, is your daddy home[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
Did he go and leave you all alone[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I've got a bad desire, Oh, I'm on fire[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Tell me now baby, is he good to you[/tab]
[tab]                                        [ch]C[/ch]
And can he do to you the things that I do[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I can take you higher, Oh, I'm on fire[/tab]

[Instrumental]
([ch]G[/ch]) [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse 3]
[tab]([ch]G[/ch])                 [ch]C[/ch]
Sometimes it's like someone took a knife baby, edgy and dull[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                  ([ch]C[/ch])
And cut a six inch valley through the middle of my skull[/tab]

[Verse 4]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]
At night I wake up with the sheets soaking wet[/tab]
[tab]                                                                [ch]C[/ch]
And a freight train running through the middle of my head, and you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
You cool my desire, Oh, I'm on fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, I'm on fire[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Oh, I'm on fire[/tab]

Fade out
